title: Velvet Cantonese Almond Stew
description: A dairyfree, nutty Cantonese stew with a silky almond broth, tender tofu and fresh vegetables.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine vegetable stock, tamari soy sauce, hoisin sauce, maple syrup, sesame oil, grated ginger, and minced garlic. Bring to a gentle simmer over medium heat, stirring to dissolve sugars.
Stir in ground almonds, whisking constantly, and let the mixture thicken until it becomes a smooth, velvety broth, about 3–4 minutes.
Add julienned carrots, sliced shiitake mushrooms, and tofu cubes. Reduce heat to low and simmer gently for 5–6 minutes, until vegetables are tender but still crisp.
Whisk 1 tablespoon cornstarch with 2 tablespoons cold water to make a slurry. Gradually pour the slurry into the stew, stirring until the sauce thickens to your desired consistency, about 1 minute.
Taste the stew and season with a pinch of salt if needed. Remove from heat.
Ladle the stew into bowls, garnish with sliced green onions, and serve hot.
